display.description: Multi-provider vector database connector supporting Qdrant, Weaviate, Chroma, and Milvus

display.name: Connection Name
display.description: Unique name for this connection (used as registry key)

display.name: DB Provider
display.description: Vector database provider

display.name: Host
display.description: Hostname or IP address of the VectorDB server

display.name: Port
display.description: TCP port for REST/HTTP traffic (provider default used if 0)

display.name: API Key
display.description: API key or bearer token for authentication

display.name: Secure Connection
display.description: Enable TLS/SSL for the connection

display.name: Skip TLS Verification
display.description: Disable certificate verification — insecure, for development/self-signed certs only

display.name: TLS Server Name
display.description: Override the server name for SNI (leave blank to use Host)

display.name: CA Certificate
display.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate used to verify the server's certificate

display.name: Client Certificate
display.description: PEM-encoded client certificate for mutual TLS (mTLS)

display.name: Client Key
display.description: PEM-encoded client private key for mutual TLS (mTLS)

display.name: Timeout (seconds)
display.description: Per-operation timeout in seconds (default: 30)

display.name: Max Retries
display.description: Maximum retries on transient errors (default: 3)

display.name: Retry Backoff (ms)
display.description: Milliseconds to wait between retries (default: 500)

display.name: gRPC Port
display.description: gRPC port (default: 6334)

display.name: HTTP Scheme
display.description: HTTP scheme: http | https (default: http)

display.name: Username
display.description: Username for authentication

display.name: Password
display.description: Password for authentication

display.name: Database Name
display.description: Milvus database name (default: default)

display.name: Configure Embedding Provider
display.description: Enable shared AI embedding configuration for this connection. When checked, activities (RAG Query, Ingest Documents) can inherit the provider, API key, and base URL from here — so you only set the secret once.

display.name: Embedding Provider
display.description: AI service used to generate vector embeddings

display.name: Embedding API Key
display.description: API key for the embedding service. Use $property[MY_KEY] to inject from an app property at runtime — the secret never appears in flogo.json.

display.name: Embedding Base URL
display.description: Override the default provider endpoint. Azure: full deployment URL. Ollama: http://localhost:11434. Custom: your endpoint. Leave blank for default OpenAI / Cohere endpoints.
